content: Commander Lilith & the Fight for Sanctuary
name: Retainer
description: The Retainer is an Effervescent shield made by Hyperion, added with the Fight for Sanctuary DLC for Borderlands 2.
notes: It is the only Hyperion-manufactured Maylay shield in the game.

special.description:
When used with the Toothpick in the Writhing Deep, it increases movement speed and jump height.

Known issue: the melee damage bonus does not apply, so it provides no roid-style boost.
special.title: Retains your guts inside your body, where they belong.

abilities: When in Writhing Deep with the Toothpick in
